statement: In every magma, Equation 2607 (`x = (y * ((z * z) * y)) * z`) implies Equation 1067 (`x = x * ((y * (z * w)) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0942
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z z) y)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op y (op z w)) x))
